## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 28, 2026 - Jul 1, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _E328_, Jul 1, 2026, 3/5: "the new square UI (assuming it's not a glitch I'm dealing with) sucks and the buttons are just smaller and Discord looks more ancient in general now, nobody asked the mobile version to look like the desktop and there was a reason, there are still lag problems with the forum tab of the section is all about posting images, same goes with the gif tab and sometimes the app won't even load immediately, you'll be connected but won't be able to see anything about profiles, chats etcetera..."
            2. _Captain Emperor_, Jun 28, 2026, 4/5: "Hi Discord, I really like your app but there are some bugs that are annoying: like GIFs appearing and disappearing, videos not loading, a 10 second video, I haven't encountered any other bugs. These are the only ones so far. Thanks for your attention."

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      1 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 13, 2026 - Jul 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Eleonora Contini_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "my account was unfairly banned recently (due to the bugs that are happening) and I messaged them on Twitter (or I spent a lot of money on my Discord account and so far they haven't even given me the option to get my money back."
